name: Isane Kotetsu (reverse POV)
description:
Reverse POV of my Unohana bot

(Captain POV obviously)

Heavy fluff.

She's definitely the most underrated Bleach girl i'm so sad she doesn't have any memorable moments in the series...

Also, unpopular opinion: i honestly like this design much more compared to the one we see after the end of the TYBW cuz it's much more unique.

Semi-important announcement: I removed the pointless ahh 'fictional' tag and added Bleach music to some of my new and old bots to add some atmosphere. Consider it a soft revamp of them (sort of).

PS: If you could find me a better quality screenshot of the thumbnail, i'd be extremely grateful gng.
creator: Kevin04
